summary: Completed testing of variant display and Make Friends features. Backend: 7/9 passed (78%). Frontend: Code review verified all implementations correct. The variant display in feed cards and Make Friends sorting by shared records are implemented correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/explore/suggested-collectors correctly uses discogs_id overlap for sorting (line 711-719 in explore.py)
Blocked users are correctly excluded via get_all_blocked_ids() combined with following_ids and hidden_ids (line 709)
The response field is named 'shared_artists' but contains shared_records count (line 727) - this maintains backward compatibility with existing frontend
PostCards.js: VariantTag is correctly placed in text area below artist for NowSpinningCard (line 195), AddedToCollectionCard (line 287), DailyPromptPostCard (line 353), ListingPostCard (line 418)
Discogs import extracts color_variant from format.text field (collection.py lines 1129-1135)
seed_data_creation: Test users and records created during pytest run (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Variant/color info feature and Make Friends shared records sorting both verified. Key findings: 1) GET /api/explore/suggested-collectors now sorts by discogs_id overlap count, excludes followed AND blocked users. 2) PostCards.js correctly displays VariantTag in text area (below artist name) for NOW_SPINNING, ADDED_TO_COLLECTION, DAILY_PROMPT, and listing_sale/trade posts. 3) Discogs import extracts color_variant from format text field. 4) Backend test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_variant_make_friends.py. 5) The 'shared_artists' field in API response now contains shared records count (backward compatible naming). 6) VariantTag only renders when color_variant exists - current feed posts don't have variant data so pills won't be visible until records with color_variant are created.

backend: test_create_record_with_color_variant - Records can be created with color_variant
test_record_without_color_variant - Records without variant have null field
test_spin_creates_post_with_record_variant - Spin response includes record with variant
test_hive_feed_posts_structure - Feed returns posts with embedded records

make_friends_feature.sorting: By discogs_id overlap count (shared records), not shared artists
make_friends_feature.fallback: When user has no records with discogs_id, returns newest users

variant_display.location: Text area below artist name in feed cards (not overlay on album art)
variant_display.conditional: Only renders when record.color_variant or post.color_variant exists

discogs_import.color_variant_extraction: From formats[].text field in Discogs release data
